common.app_tagline: Brand coverage, visibility and citation in neural-network answers.

overview_coverage.label: AI Overview coverage
overview_coverage.hint: Share of queries for which Google showed an AI Overview. This is the denominator for all visibility: you can only show up where an overview appeared at all. Formula: overviews ÷ all queries.

visibility_in_sources.label: Visibility in sources
visibility_in_sources.hint: Of queries with an overview — the share where your domain made it into the sources panel (at any position). Formula: queries with the domain in sources ÷ queries with an overview.

visibility_in_citations.label: Visibility in citations
visibility_in_citations.hint: Of queries with an overview — the share where your domain is cited in the answer text (an inline link in the prose). Citations are a subset of sources: the model cites what it retrieved, so a cited domain is always a source too. Formula: queries with a citation ÷ queries with an overview.

avg_source_position.label: Avg. source position
avg_source_position.hint: Average best (minimum) position of your domain in the sources panel — averaged over the queries where it is present. Lower is better.

avg_citation_position.label: Avg. citation position
avg_citation_position.hint: Average best position of your link among the citations in the answer text — averaged over the queries where it is present. Lower is better.

relative_citation.label: Source→citation conversion
relative_citation.hint: Of the queries where your domain made it into sources, the share where the model actually cited you. Formula: n_cited ÷ n_in_sources. Higher is better.

dashboard.run_context_empty: No data for the selected brand / engine.
dashboard.chart_info: Metric values across completed runs over time, for the selected lens. Percentages on the left axis, average positions on the right (lower is better).
dashboard.chart_empty: No completed runs to plot a trend.
dashboard.lens_panel_info: Metrics by query type (general / branded / comparative) plus the aggregate “All lenses” row.
dashboard.lens_empty: No metrics for the selected run.
dashboard.sentiment_panel_info: A short qualitative summary of how AI answers treat the brand, per query type — synthesized from the per-query sentiments.
dashboard.results_empty: No result rows for the selected run / lens.
dashboard.report_not_ready: The report.generate module is not ready yet. Run the command manually once it is available.

report.kpi_no_prev: Current run: {current}   ·   no previous run — deltas not computed
report.lenses_caption: Visibility in % (of queries with an overview); average positions in ranks (lower is better). The “All queries” row is the cross-lens total.
report.funnel_intro: The brand's path inside AI answers, narrowing at each step: where an overview is shown → where the brand made it into sources → where it is cited (citations are a subset of sources — the last step is the source→citation conversion).
report.funnel_rates: Of queries with an overview: in sources {sources}    •    in citations {citations}
report.funnel_empty: No data to build the funnel.
report.history_intro: Change in key metrics (the “All queries” lens) across completed runs.
report.sentiment_intro: Representative phrasings from AI answers about the brand — no numeric score, as-is.
report.sentiment_empty: No qualitative sentiment marks in this run.
